findings.summary: Task row places due/meta line below the title instead of the dedicated meta column implied by card-task-row internal_columns.
findings.recommendation: Refine mobile reflow so meta stays in the spec grid lane (truncating with ellipsis) unless ui_spec explicitly documents a stacked variant; update ui_spec if stacking is intentional.

findings.summary: Persistent nav highlights "Dashboard" while the main page_header reads "Tasks", weakening scan path and IA clarity versus a single coherent surface label.
findings.recommendation: Align selected nav item with the active route/surface title, or rename entries so the highlighted item matches the primary H1 owner in surface-main-column.

findings.summary: Same sidebar selection vs main title mismatch as tablet empty: "Dashboard" appears active alongside "Tasks" heading.
findings.recommendation: Same as tablet-home-empty: synchronize nav active state with the Tasks surface.

findings.summary: Sidebar active item remains "Dashboard" while main content is the Tasks dashboard in a filtered-empty state.
findings.recommendation: Synchronize nav active state with the Tasks surface for filtered views.

findings.summary: Sidebar shows "Dashboard" selected while main landmark presents "Tasks" as the dominant title.
findings.recommendation: Resolve nav vs page title ownership so users see one clear "where am I" signal at desktop width.

findings.summary: Persistent nav selection does not match the Tasks page header (Dashboard highlighted).
findings.recommendation: Match active nav item to Tasks or adjust labels so hierarchy matches ui_spec reading_order.

findings.summary: Filtered-empty state retains Dashboard-selected rail while main reads as Tasks dashboard.
findings.recommendation: Same nav/title alignment fix as other desktop/tablet captures.

findings.summary: Filtered-empty area uses a dashed outline plus a bordered "Show all tasks" button; neither matches tokenized list/empty surfaces or the underlined type-label secondary pattern in ui_spec.
findings.recommendation: Adopt bg-elevated + border-subtle for the region and a text-link secondary (or amend ui_spec for this state).

findings.summary: Same dashed container and button-styled recovery control as mobile filtered-empty; chrome diverges from spec card language.
findings.recommendation: Tokenize the container and align recovery control with empty-task-list secondary guidance or document an exception.

findings.summary: Dashed frame around filtered-empty plus secondary-filled recovery button; off-spec versus empty/list organisms.
findings.recommendation: Match other dashboard surfaces for borders and prefer underlined type-label secondary per ui_spec.

waiver_reason: tasks/app-ui-design-system/01-stitch-design-package/artifacts/design_package.json has status "refining" and stitch.approved_baseline false (not baseline_frozen). Per design_visual_acceptance.skill.md, full Stitch-backed visual law is out of scope; this record maps QA captures to structural alignment against ui_spec.json only, with no pixel-tolerance strict-visual tier. Verdict waived: baseline not formally approved; medium findings are tracked for ui-refiner/frontend follow-up, not treated as blocking Stitch parity.
